question_text: A book rests on a horizontal desk. Which of the following pairs of forces are in contact with the book?

options.label: B
options.text: Normal reaction force from the desk and friction force from the desk

options.label: C
options.text: Gravitational force and normal reaction force

correct_answer: Normal reaction force from the desk and friction force from the desk
explanation: Contact forces are forces that act when two surfaces physically touch each other. The normal reaction force (pushing up from the desk) and friction force (acting on the book's surface) both occur at the point of contact between the book and desk. Gravitational force is a non-contact force (it acts at a distance), and magnetic force only applies if magnetic materials are involved.
